title: WorkQue_Remove Statement
parameters:
WorkQueNum	Integer expression (1 - 16) that specifies the work queue number.

index	Optional.  Integer expression that represents the index of the queue data to delete.  (the beginning of the index number is 0).

Specify All when deleting all the queue data from the work queue.
description: Use WorkQue_Remove to remove one or more items from a work queue data.  Typically, you remove items from the queue after you are finished with the data.
see_also:
Deletes the work queue data (point data and user data) from the specified work queue.

WorkQue_Add

WorkQue_Remove Example

Jump WorkQue_Get(1)

On gripper

Wait .1

Jump place

Off gripper

Wait .1

' Remove the data from the WorkQueue

WorkQue_Remove 1
examples:
Jump WorkQue_Get(1)
On gripper
Wait .1
Jump place
Off gripper
Wait .1

' Remove the data from the WorkQueue
WorkQue_Remove 1
